arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund interested in Hoffenheim talent Muhammed Damar
arts.sum: Sky Germany reports that Borussia Dortmund are interested in Hoffenheim’s Muhammed Damar, who has impressed on his loan at Elversberg. Damar has been playing his trade in the 2.Bundesliga this season…

arts.ttl: Report: Chelsea could have Jamie Gittens advantage as Dortmund consider £25m bid for their 'unbelievable' man
arts.sum: Chelsea could have an advantage in the race to sign Jamie Gittens this summer as Borussia Dortmund are considering making a £25m offer for one...

arts.ttl: Dortmund linked with on-loan Hoffenheim striker
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund are being linked with a move for Hoffenheim's Muhammed Damar, who is currently on loan at Elversberg.

arts.ttl: Man City ROCKED as Erling Haaland asks to LEAVE
arts.sum: If Man City receive a heavy points penalty - which potentially could even be relegation - in their much-publicised trial, then it is already widely expected that Haaland will probably leave. Erling Haaland is unhappy and ready to quit Man City this summer, according to reports in the Spanish media.

arts.ttl: Arsenal starter ‘prioritises’ summer move to Barcelona – Aiming high
arts.sum: Arsenal’s Thomas Partey ‘prioritises’ a move to Barcelona in the summer window. That’s according to Tuesday’s edition of Mundo Deportivo, and they also cover Barcelona’s stance on signing the midfielder. The Ghana international has less than three months left on his contract at Arsenal. arts.ttl: Barca let rip at Tebas & La Liga for ‘inappropriate behavior’
arts.sum: “FC Barcelona has sent a request to LaLiga in which it shows “surprise and indignation” for the publication on April 2 of an information note entitled: ‘ On the Corporate Operation Related to VIP Boxes Communicated to La Liga by FC Barcelona at the End of December.’ “Barça underlines that it was unaware of this letter by LaLiga and that it did not give its consent, a fact that has led the Catalan entity to send a letter asking the boss, its president and any member of this body to refrain from making any comment or assessment on the economic information sent by the Catalan club, in order to deal with it.

arts.ttl: ‘Absolute top’ - Kovac hails Barca’s attack ahead of Dortmund tie
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund boss Niko Kovac has been looking ahead to Wednesday’s Champions League tie with Barcelona and knows his team are in for a tough night. “I’m happy to see Hansi.

arts.ttl: Chelsea, Arsenal receive Jamie Gittens boost as winger 'outlines transfer stance' ahead of summer window
arts.sum: Arsenal and Chelsea reportedly receive a boost to their hopes of signing Borussia Dortmund star Jamie Gittens in the summer transfer window.

arts.ttl: Barcelona plan to reopen talks with leading transfer target this summer
arts.sum: The brass at La Liga giants Barcelona intend to kick back into gear negotiations with a long-time transfer target this coming summer. That’s according to Diario Sport, who point towards…
